metadata.title: LOGOS
metadata.description: We build custom websites, systems, and applications focused on performance, design, and scalability.

hero.title: The digital infrastructure that turns ideas into
hero.description: We build custom websites, systems, and applications focused on performance, design, and scalability. We create digital solutions for companies that want to grow with technology.

services.title: Complete solutions for every stage of your digital product
services.description: From strategy to delivery — we combine architecture, design, and engineering to build platforms that deliver measurable results.

digitalArchitecture.title: Digital Architecture
digitalArchitecture.description: Scalable systems designed to grow with your business without compromising performance or stability.

interfaceDesign.title: Interface Design
interfaceDesign.description: Cohesive visual experiences and intuitive interfaces that translate your brand identity into every interaction.

softwareEngineering.title: Software Engineering
softwareEngineering.description: Robust code and high-performance interfaces with React, Next.js, and industry best practices.

digitalProducts.title: Digital Products
digitalProducts.description: From concept to deploy — complete websites, platforms, and web applications ready to scale.

seoPerformance.title: SEO & Performance
seoPerformance.description: Technical optimization for ranking, Core Web Vitals, and conversion — every millisecond counts.

securityCompliance.title: Security & Compliance
securityCompliance.description: Security, accessibility, and compliance best practices applied at every layer of the product.

clients.title: Companies that trust LOGOS
clients.description: Brands and products that chose LOGOS to build and scale their digital presence.

technologies.title: Cutting-edge technology for products that evolve
technologies.description: A modern stack chosen for performance, scalability, and maintainability — so your software grows without rework.

cases.title: Results that prove our delivery
cases.description: Real projects with real metrics. See how we turn complex challenges into competitive advantage for our clients.

fintech.title: Investment platform
fintech.description: Complete redesign with real-time dashboard and seamless onboarding for over 200,000 active users.

saas.title: B2B automation hub
saas.description: Multi-tenant architecture with proprietary admin panel and continuous deployment pipeline.

healthtech.title: Telemedicine portal
healthtech.description: Accessible and secure experience with electronic health record integration and real-time video calls.

testimonials.title: Trusted by market leaders
testimonials.description: Executives and founders who chose LOGOS to scale their digital products.

marina.quote: LOGOS delivered a platform that feels like it was built by an internal team of 50 people. The technical quality and design care are unmatched.
marina.author: Marina Costa

rafael.quote: Our time to market dropped by 60%. The partnership with LOGOS raised our delivery standard to another level.
rafael.author: Rafael Mendes

ana.quote: Impeccable design, clean code, and performance that our engineering team approved on the first review.
ana.author: Ana Beatriz Lima

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Straightforward answers to the most common questions before we start a partnership.

whatIsLogos.question: What is LOGOS?
whatIsLogos.answer: We are a software development agency that turns ideas into modern, fast, and scalable digital solutions — combining engineering, design, and performance in every project.

timeline.question: How long does a typical project take?
timeline.answer: Premium websites and landing pages take 2 to 4 weeks. Full platforms range from 8 to 16 weeks depending on scope. We always deliver incremental MVPs to validate results from day one.

internalTeams.question: Do you work with internal teams?
internalTeams.answer: Yes. We act as an extension of your team — integrating with existing designers, PMs, and engineers, or leading the project end to end.

postLaunch.question: Do you offer support after launch?
postLaunch.answer: Yes. We offer maintenance plans, continuous evolution, and technical support to keep your product secure, performant, and aligned with business needs.

investment.question: What is the investment to get started?
investment.answer: Projects start from scopes defined in a discovery phase. Schedule a call and we will build a tailored proposal for your goal.

contact.title: Let's build your
contact.description: Tell us about your company and goals. Our team will review your needs and get back to you within 24 business hours.
